bullets: Pray for Christians in China facing detention, surveillance, and ministry bans, that God would provide protection, provision, and boldness to worship and serve Him freely.
Pray for Coptic Christians in Egypt, especially those imprisoned for sharing their faith online, that God would bring justice, overturn unjust laws, and grant religious freedom to all believers.
Pray for a Christian convert in Uganda who was ambushed and severely beaten by relatives for leaving Islam, asking God for complete healing, reunion with his child, and lasting safety.
Lift up religious minorities in Syria facing sectarian violence and extrajudicial killings, that God would restrain those who perpetrate violence and bring lasting protection and peace.

Pray for the many Christians imprisoned in North Korea for possessing a Bible, speaking God's name, or sharing their faith, that God would sustain them, comfort their families, and open this closed nation.

Ask God to bring justice and an end to the relentless ADF attacks against Christians in eastern DR Congo, where dozens have been massacred in recent days, and grant safety, healing, and hope to all survivors.
Pray for civilians in Ukraine affected by military strikes on residential areas, that aid workers and humanitarian convoys may be protected and relief reach those in need.
Pray for the people of Lebanon, that ongoing violence may cease, that diplomatic talks may produce a lasting ceasefire, and that civilians caught in the conflict may find safety and peace.
Ask God for peace and justice in Bolivia, where economic hardship is driving dangerous unrest, and that vulnerable workers and families may find relief from the nation's crisis.
Pray for people across Indonesia who felt shaking from multiple earthquakes today, asking God for continued safety, calm, and protection from any delayed damage or aftershocks.
Lift up communities in Papua New Guinea near the affected coastal region, asking God to protect residents from any unreported harm caused by the shallow offshore earthquake.
Ask God to watch over the remote island populations of Japan potentially affected by seismic activity, granting peace to those in vulnerable or isolated locations.
